results.title: ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ to Hit Indian Theatres a Day Before Global Release
results.description: Indian fans get early treat as Spider-Man: Brand New Day arrives in theatres on July 30, ahead of global release.

results.title: Gene Shalit, beloved and bushy film critic on the 'Today' show, dies at 100
results.description: Gene Shalit, the fast-talking funnyman who reviewed films, plays and books for NBC's "Today" show has died. He was 100.

results.title: Millie Bobby Brown Defends Husband After Photos Show Her Carrying Car Seat & Backpacks: He ‘Knows I’m Capable’
results.description: Millie Bobby Brown is coming to her husband’s defense. results.title: Its Time For Yuvraj Singh Biopic
results.description: Producer Ravi Bhagchandka is busy working on new films under his banner 200 Not Out Productions. He is known for the cricket film Sachin A Billion Dreams
